description: Case style: Analog watch with a rounded stainless steel case for enhanced durability Dial style: Beige dial with metallic hands Strap style: Beige genuine leather strap with a beige stitch and tang clasp for comfort and style Features: Branding on the 12 hour and 6 hour mark on the dial Screw to reset time Water resistance up to 30 meters, allowing you to wear it out in the rain Warranty: 2 years (1 year for digital and ana-digital watches)
